title: ZIK-Toolbox
description: The ultimate ZIKYinc Playground for web development, content extraction, and page automation.
readme:
### 🛠 The ZIKYinc Playground Suite

Welcome to **ZIK-Toolbox**. This is a modular suite of developer utilities designed for testing and high-speed productivity.

#### 📋 Copy Tools
- **Markdown Copier:** Extracts high-fidelity Markdown (supports LaTeX, Tables, and Lists).
- **Clean Copier:** Strips syntax artifacts for a pure text clipboard.
- **Styles Copier:** Captures computed CSS as a valid class block.
- **HTML Copier:** Grabs sanitized, pretty-printed HTML source.
- **Base64 Copier:** Instantly converts any image to a Data URI.
- **Link Scraper:** Extracts all unique URLs from your selection.

#### 👁 Visual Tools
- **Mini-Inspector:** Real-time Tag, ID, and Class tooltip.
- **Typography Hover:** Instant font-family and layout specs.
- **Element Outliner:** Red-line debugging for DOM structures.
- **Layout Grid:** Overlays a standard 12-column grid for alignment checks.

#### ⚡ Utilities
- **YouTube Ad Skipper:** (Alt + S) Skips video ads and closes banner overlays.
- **Video Overdrive:** ([ and ]) Changes playback speed on any HTML5 video (up to 10x).
- **Password Revealer:** Toggles password fields to visible text for verification.
- **Auto-Clicker:** (Alt + Click) Starts an automated 0.5s click loop on a target.

#### 🚀 Development Notes
All modules are strictly self-contained. To extract a tool, simply pull the corresponding JS file from the `modules/` directory.
